tool_input.content:
# API Keys Setup

Set these environment variables in Windows System Settings or your shell profile.

## Required

| Variable | Source | Used By |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | console.anthropic.com | claude-advanced-tools |

## Optional (enable more features)

| Variable | Source | Used By |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | platform.openai.com | hooks-mastery TTS + LLM fallback |
| `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` | elevenlabs.io | hooks-mastery TTS (best quality) |
| `BLINDORACLE_API_KEY` | craigmbrown.com/blindoracle | blindoracle-client |
| `BLINDORACLE_API_URL` | `https://api.craigmbrown.com/a2a` | blindoracle-client |
| `BLINDORACLE_AGENT_NAME` | your choice | blindoracle-client |
| `ENGINEER_NAME` | your name | hooks-mastery personalization |
| `BLINDORACLE_HUB_PRIVKEY` | nostr nsec key | agent passport Schnorr signing |

## How to set on Windows (permanent)

```
! setx ANTHROPIC_API_KEY "sk-ant-..."
! setx ENGINEER_NAME "Noah"
! setx BLINDORACLE_API_URL "https://api.craigmbrown.com/a2a"
```

Or set them in Windows > System > Environment Variables GUI.

  apocalypse-shooter.html block-blast.html bone-lion-boss.html \

  2>&1 && echo "staged OK"

cd "C:/Users/noahm/Project" && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add full agentic dev setup + all game files

- Claude Code damage-control hooks (PreToolUse security firewall)
- 13 hook lifecycle scripts from hooks-mastery (logging, TTS, session management)
- 12 validators (CSV, HTML, balance, Ruff, ty)
- 14 sub-agents (meta-agent, team builder/validator, finance pipeline, crypto)
- 24 slash commands (review-finances, csv-edit, plan_w_team, prime, cook, etc.)
- 9 output styles + 9 status line variants
- Fork-terminal skill (spawn parallel Claude/Codex/Gemini agents)
- All game HTML files (dodgeball, minecraft, monster-hunter, etc.)
- Updated .gitignore (credentials, settings.local.json excluded)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
cd "C:/Users/noahm/Project" && git push workspace master 2>&1

tool_input.description: Research Claude Code changelog for new features
tool_input.prompt: Research the latest Claude Code changelog and release notes. I need a comprehensive list of new features that have been recently added, especially anything that requires configuration or setup to enable. Focus on: hooks, MCP servers, new settings, new slash commands, new permissions, IDE integrations, agent SDK features, and any other opt-in features. The user is on Windows 11 using Claude Code CLI. Please fetch the official changelog from the Claude Code docs or GitHub.
Find links to changelog, release notes, what's new, and version history documentation
List all recent features, breaking changes, new settings, hooks, MCP servers, slash commands, permissions, IDE integrations, and opt-in features from latest releases
Recent releases with new features, configuration, hooks, MCP, commands

tool_input.args: Set up all the following features: 1) Env vars in settings.json: CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1, CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1, ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H=1, CLAUDE_CODE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_SCRUB=1. 2) Settings: defaultMode="auto", showThinkingSummaries=true. 3) Hooks: PreCompact hook that runs git add -A && git commit -m "pre-compact checkpoint" (only if in a git repo), CwdChanged hook, PermissionDenied hook that returns {retry: true}. Configure these in the project settings at C:\Users\noahm\Project\.claude\settings.json and/or user settings at C:\Users\noahm\.claude\settings.json as appropriate. Env vars and global settings should go in user settings; project-specific hooks can go in project settings.
